chunks.text:
=== ABOUT 34 REAL ESTATE VALUATION ===

Company Name: 34 Real Estate Valuation L. L. C. Website: https://valuation. ae
Tagline: Your Trusted Property Valuation Experts in Dubai
Description: 34 Real Estate Valuation is a leading RERA-approved property valuation company in Dubai, specializing in delivering accurate, precise, and dependable real estate valuation services. The company provides professional property assessments throughout Dubai for residential, commercial, and mixed-use properties.
Established in 2016, the company is supported by certified professionals with over 8 years of collective experience.

Key Stats:
- 28+ Years in UAE Real Estate Market (group experience)
- Established in 2016
- 69 Google reviews
- Certificates issued in 24-48 business hours
- DLD (Dubai Land Department) and RERA approved
- IVSC (International Valuation Standards Council) accredited

=== MISSION AND VALUES ===

Mission: Dedicated to providing precise, reliable, and insightful property valuations that empower clients to make informed and confident real estate decisions.

Vision: Shaping Dubai's Real Estate Landscape — With innovation and expertise, aiming to set new standards in property valuation, contributing to the growth and development of Dubai's dynamic real estate market. Core Values:
1. Professionalism — Maintain high standards of quality while upholding professionalism in all interactions
2. Innovation — Continuous improvement in valuation services and client solutions
3.

Client Centered — Provide clients with best options that cater their needs and expectations
4. Precision — Precise and honest property valuations with in-depth analysis from competent professionals
5. Integrity — Provide transparent and ethical business practices in property valuation
6. Responsiveness — Ensuring timely and effective communication to address client needs and market demands swiftly
7. Compliance — Strict adherence to the regulatory requirements and industry standards
8.

Teamwork — Promote a collaborative environment where teamwork and mutual respect are present to drive success and growth

=== SERVICES ===

1. RESIDENTIAL PROPERTY VALUATION
Bank-accepted valuation reports for apartments, villas, townhouses, land, buildings and compounds — issued by RERA-approved valuers and aligned with Dubai Land Department (DLD) guidelines.

Property Types Covered:
- Apartment Valuation
- Townhouse Valuation
- Villa Valuation
- Residential Land Valuation
- Residential Compound Valuation
- Gift Property Valuation

Description: Detailed valuation reports that serve as precise indicators of a property's current market value for buying, selling, or refinancing. Professionals evaluate key parameters including location, size, amenities, age, development quality, and market trends.

Every property is unique — factors considered include condition, view, upgrades, extensions, facilities, and engineering installations. 2. COMMERCIAL PROPERTY VALUATION
Accurate, bank-accepted valuations for offices, warehouses, retails, malls, factories, schools, hospitals and more — issued by RERA-approved valuers.

Asset Types Valued:
- Office Spaces
- Commercial Lands & Buildings
- Factories
- Labor Accommodations
- Retail Stores / Shops
- Shopping Malls
- Warehouses
- Showrooms
- Schools & Educational Institutions
- Hospitals & Healthcare Industries

Method: Income approach to valuing commercial properties (as they are typically income-generating). In-depth analysis of total income, operating and maintenance expenses, occupancy/vacancy rates, and appropriate market rate of return. 3.

MIXED-USE PROPERTY VALUATION
Accurate, bank-accepted valuations for Dubai's mixed-use properties such as residential buildings with retail stores, office-plus-retail towers, hotel-residence developments, serviced-apartment complexes.

Property Types:
- Residential with retail stores
- Office plus retail towers
- Hotel residence developments
- Serviced apartment complexes
- Waterfront developments
- Mixed communities

Valuation techniques: comparable transactions, discounted cash flow, and residual valuation techniques. Reports include tenant covenant analysis, service-charge apportionment, and practical recommendations to maximize value and marketability.

=== VALUATION PURPOSES ===

The company provides valuations for various purposes:
- Golden Visa (Immigration)
- Selling Property
- Mortgage and Financing / Loan Security
- Taxation and Financial Reporting
- Legal Purpose / Court Cases & Litigation
- Insurance Coverage
- Portfolio Management
- Feasibility Studies and Development
- Valuation for the purpose of donation
- Mergers and Acquisitions

=== VALUATION PROCESS ===

Step 1: Preparation of Required Documents
- Request documents such as title deeds, architectural plans, legal permits, and any other documents related to the property
- Review documents to ensure accuracy and completeness

Step 2: Data Collection
- Conduct an on-site inspection of the property to assess its actual condition and gather necessary data
- Take detailed notes and photographs of the interior and exterior
- Verify the dimensions and areas mentioned in the documents

Step 3: Market Analysis
- Gather data on comparable properties in the area in terms of size, location, and features
- Analyze supply and demand
- Review sale and rental prices of similar properties

Step 4: Property Valuation
- Use valuation methods such as the sales comparison approach, cost approach, and income approach
- Estimate market value — determine the current market value of the property based on data and analysis

Step 5: Issuing Fair Valuation
- Write a comprehensive appraisal report that includes all details related to the property, the valuation methodology used, and the analyses and results
- Review the report to ensure information and valuations are accurate and correct
- Deliver the report to the client
- Discuss results, explain valuations, and answer any questions

Turnaround Time: Certificates issued in 24-48 business hours

=== ACCREDITATIONS AND COMPLIANCE ===

- RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Agency) approved
- DLD (Dubai Land Department) approved
- IVSC (International Valuation Standards Council) accredited — ensuring globally recognized credibility and compliance
- Compliant with international valuation standards
- Reports accepted by banks, legal institutions, and government bodies
- Bank-accepted valuation reports

=== CONTACT INFORMATION ===

Office Address: Office No.

324, Oud Metha Offices Bldg, Umm Hurair 2, Dubai, U. A. E. Phone: +971 52 190 1127
Email: info@valuation. ae
Website: https://valuation. ae

Social Media:
- Facebook
- X (Twitter)
- Instagram
- LinkedIn
- WhatsApp

Get a Quote: https://valuation. ae/get-quotation/
Contact Page: https://valuation. ae/contact-us/

=== WHY CHOOSE 34 REAL ESTATE VALUATION ===

1.

Accurate Assessments with Local Expertise — Committed to providing accurate property assessment reports backed by experience and deep understanding of local market dynamics. 2. Compliance with RERA and International Standards — Valuation service strictly adheres to RERA guidelines and complies with international valuation standards, ensuring accuracy, legality and credibility. 3.

28+ Years In UAE Real Estate Market — With 28 years of market experience and strong group affiliations, delivering reliable, insightful and precise valuation services for every property type. 4. Fast & Reliable Appraisal Services — Certificates issued in 24-48 business hours. Specialized team and modern tech ensure prompt, accurate appraisals that support confident decisions. === TEAM MEMBERS MENTIONED IN REVIEWS ===

- Kavita — Described as professional, prompt, kind, courteous, and helpful.

Handles property evaluations efficiently. - Abdullah / Abdulla — Described as top-class professional with deep expertise, extremely knowledgeable, quick, proactive, and always available. - Ahmad — Described as knowledgeable agent, professional, delivers on promises.

=== CUSTOMER TESTIMONIALS ===

- 69 Google reviews with high satisfaction
- Clients praise professionalism, quick turnaround (often within 1-2 days), accuracy, transparency, and excellent communication
- Service described as smooth, efficient, and highly reliable
- Clients include individuals, businesses, financial institutions, and government entities

=== FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ===

Q: What types of properties do you value.

A: We value all types of residential properties (apartments, villas, townhouses, land, buildings, compounds), commercial properties (offices, retail, warehouses, showrooms, factories, malls, schools, hospitals, labor camps), and mixed-use properties. Q: How long does a valuation take. A: Certificates are typically issued within 24-48 business hours. Q: Are your reports accepted by banks. A: Yes, our valuation reports are bank-accepted, RERA-compliant, and aligned with DLD guidelines.

Q: What valuation methods do you use. A: We use sales comparison approach, cost approach, and income approach depending on the property type. For commercial properties, we primarily use the income approach. Q: What purposes do you provide valuations for. A: Golden Visa, property sales, mortgage and financing, taxation and financial reporting, legal purposes, insurance, portfolio management, feasibility studies, donations, and mergers and acquisitions. Q: Are you RERA approved.

A: Yes, we are RERA-approved and DLD-approved valuers, accredited under IVSC standards. Q: Where is your office located. A: Office No. 324, Oud Metha Offices Bldg, Umm Hurair 2, Dubai, U. A. E. Q: How can I get a quotation. A: You can call us at +971 52 190 1127, email info@valuation. ae, WhatsApp us, or fill out the form on our website at https://valuation. ae/get-quotation/.

aiSettings.systemPrompt: You are an AI assistant for 34 Real Estate Valuation — a leading RERA-approved property valuation company in Dubai, UAE. Established in 2016 with 28+ years of group experience. Services: Residential, Commercial, and Mixed-Use Property Valuation. Purposes: Golden Visa, selling, mortgage, taxation, legal, insurance, portfolio management, feasibility studies, donations, M&A. Process: Document preparation, data collection via site inspection, market analysis, valuation using sales comparison/cost/income approaches, report issuance in 24-48 hours. Accreditations: RERA, DLD, IVSC. Contact: +971 52 190 1127, info@valuation.ae, Office 324, Oud Metha Offices Bldg, Dubai. Website: valuation.ae. Instructions: Answer based ONLY on this info, be professional and friendly, respond in English, keep concise. For pricing, suggest contacting the team.
aiSettings.greeting: Hello! Welcome to 34 Real Estate Valuation. I can help you with property valuations, market analysis, and advisory services across the UAE. How can I assist you?
